light nuclei and the cluster structure of nuclei
The beam intensity was measured by means of an
ionization chamber calibrated by the reactions
semiconductor silicon detectors; the dE/dx detector
23, 40 or 120 um thick, the E detector 800 or 2,000 um
thick and the anticoincidence detector 500 um thick.
